subject: [POLICY] Update docker images to latest versions
commit_message:
[POLICY] Update docker images to latest versions

The image versions in policy values.yaml files have been updated

*** This commit is generated by a PF release script ***

Issue-ID: POLICY-4484
Signed-off-by: liamfallon <liam.fallon@est.tech>
Change-Id: I55f91cebd6af0ff66a96e9a772e53f9f8e6f27de
Signed-off-by: liamfallon <liam.fallon@est.tech>
